name: update_checklist
description: Mark a step complete/incomplete. Payload: {step_id, completed}. IDs: immigration, address, mynumber, health, pension, bank, phone, extras.

name: highlight_step
description: Expand a step in the UI to show forms and docs. Payload: {step_id}. IDs: immigration, address, mynumber, health, pension, bank, phone, extras.

name: checklist_status
description: Current checklist state from the UI. Payload: {completed: [step_ids], pending: [step_ids]}. Sent on connect and when user asks next steps.

name: step_focused
description: User expanded a step in the UI. Payload: {step_id, step_title}. Use as silent context for your next response.

name: checklist_query
description: User clicked Ask Jizo on a step. Payload: {step_id, step_title, query}. Respond with step-by-step guidance for that step.
